entries.title: Octave Day of Christmas
entries.subtitle: The Circumcision and Name of the Lord within Christmastide.
entries.summary: The year opens under the mystery of the Incarnation and the saving obedience of the Lord.

entries.title: Feast of the Holy Name of Jesus
entries.subtitle: Christmastide Sunday
entries.summary: The first covered Sunday of the year turns the faithful toward the saving Name of the Incarnate Lord.

entries.title: Epiphany of the Lord
entries.subtitle: The Lord is made manifest to the nations.
entries.summary: The Mass celebrates the manifestation of Christ and the widening of His light to the Gentiles.

entries.title: First Sunday after Epiphany
entries.subtitle: Christmastide continues after the Epiphany.
entries.summary: The liturgy keeps the gaze on the hidden life of Christ while the Church reflects on the manifestation of the Lord.

entries.title: Second Sunday after Epiphany
entries.subtitle: Epiphany season Sunday
entries.summary: The propers continue the Epiphany season emphasis on the Lord being made known to the nations.

entries.title: Third Sunday after Epiphany
entries.subtitle: Epiphany season Sunday
entries.summary: The Church asks for deeper trust in Christ’s authority and mercy as the Epiphany cycle continues.

entries.title: Septuagesima Sunday
entries.subtitle: Pre-Lent begins.
entries.summary: The liturgy begins to sober the faithful before Lent and turns the mind toward repentance and perseverance.

entries.title: Sexagesima Sunday
entries.subtitle: Pre-Lent Sunday
entries.summary: The Church stays with pre-Lenten conversion and urges the faithful to receive the word fruitfully.

entries.title: Quinquagesima Sunday
entries.subtitle: The final Sunday before Lent.
entries.summary: The liturgy stands on the threshold of Lent and teaches charity, humility, and readiness to follow Christ.

entries.title: First Sunday of Lent
entries.subtitle: Lent has begun.
entries.summary: The proper texts begin the Lenten contest with prayer, fasting, and a sharper call to conversion.

entries.title: Second Sunday of Lent
entries.subtitle: Lenten Sunday
entries.summary: The Church continues the Lenten ascent and teaches patience, recollection, and confidence in grace.

entries.title: Third Sunday of Lent
entries.subtitle: Lenten Sunday
entries.summary: The proper texts press the faithful toward deeper purification and steadier interior prayer.

entries.title: Fourth Sunday of Lent
entries.subtitle: Laetare Sunday
entries.summary: Even in penitential season, the liturgy gives a restrained note of joy and confidence in God’s mercy.

entries.title: Saint Joseph, Spouse of the Blessed Virgin Mary
entries.subtitle: A major March feast in the Lenten cycle.
entries.summary: The proper texts honor the guardian of the Redeemer and teach hidden fidelity.

entries.title: Passion Sunday
entries.subtitle: Passiontide begins.
entries.summary: The Church turns more directly toward the Passion and keeps the faithful close to the coming sacrifice.

entries.title: Annunciation of the Blessed Virgin Mary
entries.subtitle: The Incarnation announced by the Angel.
entries.summary: The Church contemplates the beginning of the Incarnation and Our Lady’s fiat.

entries.title: Palm Sunday
entries.subtitle: Holy Week begins.
entries.summary: The Mass turns toward Christ’s royal entry and His Passion, opening the most solemn week of the year.

entries.title: Easter Sunday
entries.subtitle: The Resurrection of the Lord.
entries.summary: The Paschal proper texts proclaim the Resurrection and fill the liturgy with victory and thanksgiving.

entries.title: Low Sunday
entries.subtitle: The Octave of Easter continues.
entries.summary: The second Sunday of Easter keeps the Church in the joy and wonder of the Resurrection.

entries.title: Second Sunday after Easter
entries.subtitle: Eastertide Sunday
entries.summary: The Paschal season continues with proper texts centered on the risen Christ and the care of the Good Shepherd.

entries.title: Third Sunday after Easter
entries.subtitle: Eastertide Sunday
entries.summary: The Church keeps the faithful steady in Easter joy while pointing them toward patience and prayer.

entries.title: Fourth Sunday after Easter
entries.subtitle: Eastertide Sunday
entries.summary: The Resurrection season continues, and the proper texts keep the Church attentive to Christ’s promises.

entries.title: Fifth Sunday after Easter
entries.subtitle: Eastertide Sunday
entries.summary: The liturgy prepares the faithful for Ascension and Pentecost with themes of prayer and confidence.

entries.title: Ascension of the Lord
entries.subtitle: Forty days after Easter.
entries.summary: The Lord ascends in glory, and the Church learns to long for heavenly things.

entries.title: Sunday after Ascension
entries.subtitle: The Church waits prayerfully for Pentecost.
entries.summary: The proper texts hold the faithful between the Ascension and Pentecost in watchful expectation.

entries.title: Pentecost Sunday
entries.subtitle: The coming of the Holy Ghost.
entries.summary: The Church celebrates the outpouring of the Holy Ghost and the public strength of the apostolic Church.

entries.title: Trinity Sunday
entries.subtitle: The mystery of the Blessed Trinity.
entries.summary: The Mass turns from Paschal fulfillment to adoration of the Most Holy Trinity.

entries.title: Corpus Christi
entries.subtitle: The mystery of the Blessed Sacrament.
entries.summary: The Church dwells with special clarity on the gift of the Eucharistic Lord.

entries.title: 2nd Sunday after Pentecost
entries.subtitle: Post-Pentecost Sunday
entries.summary: The Church continues the long green season with proper texts that teach perseverance, gratitude, and readiness for the Lord’s return.

entries.title: Sacred Heart of Jesus
entries.subtitle: The love of Christ made visible in His Heart.
entries.summary: The proper texts turn the faithful toward reparation, love, and trust in the Heart of Christ.

entries.title: 3rd Sunday after Pentecost
entries.subtitle: Post-Pentecost Sunday
entries.summary: The Church continues the long green season with proper texts that teach perseverance, gratitude, and readiness for the Lord’s return.

entries.title: 4th Sunday after Pentecost
entries.subtitle: Post-Pentecost Sunday
entries.summary: The Church continues the long green season with proper texts that teach perseverance, gratitude, and readiness for the Lord’s return.

entries.title: 5th Sunday after Pentecost
entries.subtitle: Post-Pentecost Sunday
entries.summary: The Church continues the long green season with proper texts that teach perseverance, gratitude, and readiness for the Lord’s return.

entries.title: 6th Sunday after Pentecost
entries.subtitle: Post-Pentecost Sunday
entries.summary: The Church continues the long green season with proper texts that teach perseverance, gratitude, and readiness for the Lord’s return.

entries.title: 7th Sunday after Pentecost
entries.subtitle: Post-Pentecost Sunday
entries.summary: The Church continues the long green season with proper texts that teach perseverance, gratitude, and readiness for the Lord’s return.

entries.title: 8th Sunday after Pentecost
entries.subtitle: Post-Pentecost Sunday
entries.summary: The Church continues the long green season with proper texts that teach perseverance, gratitude, and readiness for the Lord’s return.

entries.title: 9th Sunday after Pentecost
entries.subtitle: Post-Pentecost Sunday
entries.summary: The Church continues the long green season with proper texts that teach perseverance, gratitude, and readiness for the Lord’s return.

entries.title: 10th Sunday after Pentecost
entries.subtitle: Post-Pentecost Sunday
entries.summary: The Church continues the long green season with proper texts that teach perseverance, gratitude, and readiness for the Lord’s return.

entries.title: 11th Sunday after Pentecost
entries.subtitle: Post-Pentecost Sunday
entries.summary: The Church continues the long green season with proper texts that teach perseverance, gratitude, and readiness for the Lord’s return.

entries.title: Assumption of the Blessed Virgin Mary
entries.subtitle: The Blessed Virgin is taken into heavenly glory.
entries.summary: The liturgy contemplates Our Lady’s triumph and the hope of bodily resurrection.

entries.title: 12th Sunday after Pentecost
entries.subtitle: Post-Pentecost Sunday
entries.summary: The Church continues the long green season with proper texts that teach perseverance, gratitude, and readiness for the Lord’s return.

entries.title: 13th Sunday after Pentecost
entries.subtitle: Post-Pentecost Sunday
entries.summary: The Church continues the long green season with proper texts that teach perseverance, gratitude, and readiness for the Lord’s return.

entries.title: 14th Sunday after Pentecost
entries.subtitle: Post-Pentecost Sunday
entries.summary: The Church continues the long green season with proper texts that teach perseverance, gratitude, and readiness for the Lord’s return.

entries.title: 15th Sunday after Pentecost
entries.subtitle: Post-Pentecost Sunday
entries.summary: The Church continues the long green season with proper texts that teach perseverance, gratitude, and readiness for the Lord’s return.

entries.title: 16th Sunday after Pentecost
entries.subtitle: Post-Pentecost Sunday
entries.summary: The Church continues the long green season with proper texts that teach perseverance, gratitude, and readiness for the Lord’s return.

entries.title: 17th Sunday after Pentecost
entries.subtitle: Post-Pentecost Sunday
entries.summary: The Church continues the long green season with proper texts that teach perseverance, gratitude, and readiness for the Lord’s return.

entries.title: 18th Sunday after Pentecost
entries.subtitle: Post-Pentecost Sunday
entries.summary: The Church continues the long green season with proper texts that teach perseverance, gratitude, and readiness for the Lord’s return.

entries.title: 19th Sunday after Pentecost
entries.subtitle: Post-Pentecost Sunday
entries.summary: The Church continues the long green season with proper texts that teach perseverance, gratitude, and readiness for the Lord’s return.

entries.title: 20th Sunday after Pentecost
entries.subtitle: Post-Pentecost Sunday
entries.summary: The Church continues the long green season with proper texts that teach perseverance, gratitude, and readiness for the Lord’s return.

entries.title: 21st Sunday after Pentecost
entries.subtitle: Post-Pentecost Sunday
entries.summary: The Church continues the long green season with proper texts that teach perseverance, gratitude, and readiness for the Lord’s return.

entries.title: Feast of Christ the King
entries.subtitle: The kingship of Christ over souls and societies.
entries.summary: The liturgy proclaims the social reign of Christ and calls the faithful to ordered loyalty under His kingship.

entries.title: 23rd Sunday after Pentecost
entries.subtitle: Post-Pentecost Sunday
entries.summary: The Church continues the long green season with proper texts that teach perseverance, gratitude, and readiness for the Lord’s return.

entries.title: All Saints
entries.subtitle: The triumph of the whole heavenly court.
entries.summary: The Church honors the saints together and gives the faithful a vision of heavenly intercession.

entries.title: 24th Sunday after Pentecost
entries.subtitle: Post-Pentecost Sunday
entries.summary: The Church continues the long green season with proper texts that teach perseverance, gratitude, and readiness for the Lord’s return.

entries.title: 25th Sunday after Pentecost
entries.subtitle: Post-Pentecost Sunday
entries.summary: The Church continues the long green season with proper texts that teach perseverance, gratitude, and readiness for the Lord’s return.

entries.title: 26th Sunday after Pentecost
entries.subtitle: Post-Pentecost Sunday
entries.summary: The Church continues the long green season with proper texts that teach perseverance, gratitude, and readiness for the Lord’s return.

entries.title: First Sunday of Advent
entries.subtitle: The liturgical year turns toward the coming of the Lord.
entries.summary: Advent begins with sober hope and a call to vigilance as the Church prepares for Christmas.

entries.title: Second Sunday of Advent
entries.subtitle: Advent Sunday
entries.summary: The Church continues her Advent watch with proper texts shaped by desire, repentance, and expectation.

entries.title: Immaculate Conception
entries.subtitle: The sinless conception of the Blessed Virgin Mary.
entries.summary: The proper texts praise the prevenient grace that prepared the Mother of God.

entries.title: Third Sunday of Advent
entries.subtitle: Gaudete Sunday
entries.summary: Advent joy becomes more visible here, even while the season keeps its prayerful restraint.

entries.title: Fourth Sunday of Advent
entries.subtitle: The final Sunday before Christmas.
entries.summary: The liturgy stands close to the Nativity and keeps the faithful in reverent expectation.

entries.title: Christmas Day
entries.subtitle: The Nativity of the Lord.
entries.summary: The Mass rejoices in the Word made flesh and the humility of the Savior’s birth.

entries.title: Sunday within the Octave of Christmas
entries.subtitle: Christmastide Sunday
entries.summary: The Church remains close to the mystery of the Nativity and keeps Christmas thanksgiving alive.
